description: Natural is a payments platform for AI agents, apps, and businesses to send, receive, and manage money. It provides wallet, payment, transfer, agent, customer, and webhook capabilities through its platform.
summary: Natural exposes a hosted MCP server at mcp.natural.co, a REST API at api.natural.co, and a `natural` CLI; authentication is via MCP OAuth, CLI browser OAuth, or Bearer API/agent keys depending on surface.
